form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 515m (29.76) beating Sahara Pearl in Grade 4/5 on April 11. Excellent record from this draw, including two wins. Go well.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.29) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing fifth and beaten 7 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and five minors. Leading chance.

formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (30.29) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing fifth and beaten 7 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and five minors. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 600m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.
